DOCTIFY - AI-Powered Document Intelligence Platform

What is Doctify?

Doctify is an enterprise-grade AI-powered SaaS platform designed for intelligent document processing, OCR (Optical Character Recognition), and advanced document management. The platform leverages cutting-edge artificial intelligence to transform how organizations handle, process, and extract value from their document workflows.

Core Features:

1. Intelligent OCR Processing
   - Multi-language support with high accuracy
   - Automatic text extraction from scanned documents
   - Handles PDFs, images, and various document formats
   - L25 orchestration with multiple AI providers for reliability

2. RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)
   - Semantic search across document collections
   - AI-powered question answering based on document content
   - Contextual information retrieval with source citations
   - Vector similarity search using pgvector

3. Multi-AI Provider Architecture
   - OpenAI GPT-4V integration
   - Anthropic Claude support
   - Google AI compatibility
   - Automatic fallback chain for high availability

4. Document Management
   - Secure document storage and organization
   - Project-based document categorization
   - User access control and permissions
   - Full audit trail and version history

Technical Architecture:

Backend: FastAPI (Python 3.11+) with AsyncIO, PostgreSQL 15 with pgvector, Redis 7, Celery
Frontend: React 18 with TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS
Deployment: Docker, GitHub Actions, production-ready monitoring

Security: JWT authentication, rate limiting, CORS protection, audit logging

Performance: API response < 500ms, 1000+ concurrent users, async processing

Use Cases: Legal document analysis, medical records processing, financial compliance, research organization, contract management

Project Status: Phase 11 (RAG Implementation) completed with comprehensive testing.
